description: CompositionBlack self checked three-buttoned waistcoat with a shell made of 100% combed cotton, striped lining made of 100% cotton, two insert pockets on the front, one insert pocket on the left chest and one insert pocket on the inside of the left chestFitSlimWash care Hand wash or machine wash cold Wash dark colours separately using mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low and dry in shade Warm iron Add a spark to your boring formals and add a touch of sophistication to your casual dressing with this fabulous waistcoat from scullers. Pair it with formals or casuals to take your style of dressing to the next step and stand out in a crowd.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
